---
title: '2014/02/10 Journal Mon'
date: '2014-02-10T13:09:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8948991756678239827'
blogger_filename: '/2014/02/20140210-journal-mon.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>VOD<br>
Galatians 3:5<br>
God heals through faith in His finished work... not you good works.</p>
<p>Thanks<br>
Thanks for helping me love my family better.</p>
<p>Feeling<br>
Semi confidence that this AAA will come through. Nevertheless I trust you Father regardless.</p>
<p>What's up?<br>
It's Monday I'm about to get ready for a job that bores me to literal tears. </p>
<p>Need to complete the taxes... feel I should wait until tonight.</p>
<p>Time to do <u>this</u></p>
